operating_rules: Each implementation phase must produce a working slice, failing-then-passing tests, and adversarial review before the next phase starts.
Current rethink phases are stdlib-only unless a phase explicitly adopts an external service.
Legacy SurrealDB-era progress is archival and must not drive current phase selection.

7.name: Rehearsal
7.next_action: Start Phase 8 design review for drives and attention.

8.name: Drives And Attention
8.next_action: Start Phase 9 design review for vitality and zombie tests.

9.name: Vitality And Zombie Tests
limitations: Current vitality diagnostics prove a limited counterfactual gate over journal replay and attention.
They do not yet prove full projection, typed retrieval, and reflection integration.
9.next_action: Start Phase 10 design review for the integrated cognition packet.

10.name: Integrated Cognition Packet
implemented_slice: Preview-only integrated packet over prebuilt projection state.
Structured influence chain from claim evidence refs through projection, retrieval paths, drive refs, attention refs, and packet vitality summary.
Stable retrieval path ids and packet validation for projection/retrieval causal use.
Service-free smoke path separate from meno.sh.
Executable Phase 10 mutant gate covering residue-only, projection-free, retrieval-free, posthoc, salience-only, provenance, formulaic, and legacy-runtime failures.
Paired-history fixture proving same context with different projected histories changes retrieval, attention, and particularity basis.
Private-scope fixture proving blocked retrieval is reported without leaking restricted labels.
Provisional dream/rehearsal fixture proving hypothesis and simulation material remains not-factual and neutral for vitality.
Irrelevant-history fixture proving retrieved but off-context history cannot claim positive influence or particularity.
Structured reflection disposition with cited influence refs, confidence limits, and rejected interpretations without identity prose.

Post-review hardening: attention allocation now only sees retrieval-linked drives, selected refs must match selected drive influence, forged claim refs fail structural validation, and rest is evidence-derived rather than context-commanded.
Targeted-review hardening: store-aware provenance audit rejects full-shaped forged evidence refs and forged drive influence mappings; provisional-only material cannot assert positive particularity.
verification_2026_06_21: Full suite green: 102 passed (16 cognition tests).

All 11 zombie mutant fixtures present and gated: residue_only, projection_free, retrieval_free, attention_ignores_retrieval, posthoc_explainer, salience_only, irrelevant_history_personalizer, shuffled_provenance, scope_leaker, formulaic_reflector, legacy_runtime_importer.
Import-boundary test confirms cognition does not load legacy SurrealDB runtime modules.
Service-free smoke path (src/cognition_smoke.py) runs standalone -> accepted / private_reflection.
Accepted 'rest' fixture present: chooses rest because internal consolidation is more honest than recommendation.
10.next_action: Phase 10 complete. Rethink build plan (phases 0-10) finished. Next work is agent-driven, not plan-driven; revisit charter before adding commit_journal_events (requires separate adversarial review).

notes: Use this file for rethink phase status.
The archived legacy progress file describes the original SurrealDB-era implementation and is retained only for historical reference.
